title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: June 8, 2023
summary: June 8 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice had a decrease , since last week, by a lower rate of 2.99% , from the level on 06/01/2023 of 11.907 M km 2 to 11.551 M km 2 for this week.
